sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33390" key="e)lai+sth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλᾱ-ϊστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλᾱ-ιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n33390.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">olive-gatherer</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:146" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.146</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:130" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.130</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
